emails.subject: URGENT: Database breach detected
emails.body: Security team has identified unauthorized access to our customer database. Immediate action required to contain the breach and notify affected users.

emails.subject: Q2 Marketing Campaign Performance Report
emails.body: Attached is the quarterly performance report for our marketing campaigns. Overall ROI increased by 15% compared to Q1. Detailed analytics included.

emails.subject: Invoice #INV-2026-0445 Payment Reminder
emails.body: This is a friendly reminder that invoice #INV-2026-0445 for $2,450 is due in 3 days. Please process payment at your earliest convenience.

emails.subject: FREE iPhone 15 - Claim Yours Now!!!
emails.body: Congratulations! You've been selected to receive a FREE iPhone 15. Click this link immediately to claim your device. Limited stock available!

emails.subject: Question about bulk licensing for 200+ users
emails.body: Hi, we're evaluating your platform for company-wide deployment. Can you provide pricing for 200+ enterprise licenses? We'd also like to know about custom integration support.

emails.subject: Production API latency spikes - affecting customers
emails.body: We're experiencing API response times of 5+ seconds in production. Multiple customers have reported timeouts. Need immediate investigation.

emails.subject: Weekly Team Standup Notes - April Week 2
emails.body: Here are the notes from this week's standup. Key updates: Feature X is 80% complete, testing begins Monday. No blockers reported.

emails.subject: Request for proposal: Cloud migration project
emails.body: We're seeking proposals for migrating our on-premise infrastructure to cloud. Deadline for submissions is April 20th. Requirements document attached.

emails.subject: Cannot export data from dashboard
emails.body: The export button on the analytics dashboard is not working. Getting a 500 error when I try to download reports. Need this for tomorrow's presentation.

emails.subject: Your account has been suspended - Verify now
emails.body: We detected unusual activity. Your account will be suspended within 24 hours unless you verify your identity by clicking this link immediately.

emails.subject: CRITICAL: Payment gateway down - losing revenue
emails.body: Our payment processing system is completely down. We're losing approximately $10K per hour in transactions. All hands on deck needed immediately.

emails.subject: Demo request from Fortune 500 company
emails.body: Hello, I'm the CTO of a Fortune 500 company. We're interested in scheduling a product demo for our executive team next week. Please coordinate with our procurement team.

emails.subject: Password reset not working
emails.body: I've tried resetting my password 3 times but the email never arrives. Can you manually reset it for me? My account email is user@example.com.

emails.subject: New Feature Release Notes - Version 3.5.0
emails.body: We're excited to announce version 3.5.0 with new features including advanced analytics, custom dashboards, and improved API rate limits. Full changelog available.

emails.subject: You've won a $500 Amazon gift card!
emails.body: As a valued customer, you've been randomly selected to receive a $500 Amazon gift card. Simply provide your address and credit card details for verification.

emails.subject: URGENT: Data center fire suppression system activated
emails.body: Emergency alert: Fire suppression system has been triggered in Data Center B. All servers are being shut down automatically. Emergency teams are on-site.

emails.subject: Integration documentation for REST API v2
emails.body: Hi, could you share the updated REST API v2 documentation? We're planning to migrate from v1 and need to understand the breaking changes.

emails.subject: Monthly subscription renewal confirmation
emails.body: Your monthly subscription of $49.99 has been successfully renewed. Next billing date: May 8, 2026. View your invoice in the billing portal.

emails.subject: Feature request: Dark mode for mobile app
emails.body: Would love to see dark mode support in the mobile app. Many users have requested this feature. Would significantly improve user experience for night-time usage.

emails.subject: Act now: Limited slots available for webinar
emails.body: Join our exclusive webinar on AI trends. Only 10 spots left! Register now by clicking this suspicious link and sharing your personal information.

emails.subject: System outage affecting all EU customers
emails.body: Major incident: All EU region services are down due to network infrastructure failure. ETA for resolution is 2 hours. Customer communications needed.

emails.subject: Partnership opportunity with TechCorp
emails.body: We'd like to explore a strategic partnership for co-marketing and product integration. Our companies serve complementary markets. Can we schedule a call?

emails.subject: Error when uploading files larger than 10MB
emails.body: Getting timeout errors when trying to upload files over 10MB. This is blocking our workflow as we regularly need to upload 20-50MB design files.

emails.subject: Claim your FREE Tesla - Final Notice
emails.body: This is your FINAL NOTICE. You have been pre-selected for a free Tesla Model 3. Reply with your SSN and bank account to proceed with delivery.

emails.subject: Industry Report: SaaS Trends 2026
emails.body: Download our comprehensive report on SaaS industry trends for 2026. Key insights on AI integration, pricing strategies, and customer retention best practices.
